# services.gotosocial

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.gotosocial`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.gotosocial.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ActivityPub social network server. |
| `services.gotosocial.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | File path containing environment variables for configuring the GoToSocial service in the format of an EnvironmentFile as described by {manpage}`systemd.exec(5)`. This option could be used to pass sensitive configuration to the GoToSocial daemon. Please refer to the Environment Variables section in the [documentation](https://docs.gotosocial.org/en/latest/configuration/). |
| `services.gotosocial.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open the configured port in the firewall. Using a reverse proxy instead is highly recommended. |
| `services.gotosocial.package` | `package` | The gotosocial package to use. |
| `services.gotosocial.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Contents of the GoToSocial YAML config. Please refer to the [documentation](https://docs.gotosocial.org/en/latest/configuration/) and [example config](https://github.com/superseriousbusiness/gotosocial/blob/main/example/config.yaml). Please note that the `host` option cannot be changed later so it is important to configure this correctly before you start GoToSocial. |
| `services.gotosocial.setupPostgresqlDB` | `boolean` | Whether to setup a local postgres database and populate the `db-type` fields in `services.gotosocial.settings`. |
